title: Mail
overview: Part 1 of Kambalapalli Kathalu from Aha.  Fascinated by the world of computers and the internet, an innocent 18-year-old Ravi feels elated when a fellow villager Hybath opens a gaming centre. Soon, an email unfurls a series of unexpected events stirring life-altering experiences.
